title: Polish character card import/export trust surfaces
description: Add an owner-confirmed compatibility preview for SillyTavern role-card imports and expose a small JSON export affordance without changing schema or backend contracts.
acceptance: Selecting a JSON/PNG character card opens an owner-readable preview instead of immediately saving.
Preview states which fields are mapped, which compatibility items need review, and whether prompt-risk lint blocks import.
Confirming import keeps the existing prompt-risk block before calling the save API.
Existing SillyTavern character_book/world_info content is not silently discarded by the owner-management import path.
Existing characters have a JSON export button that uses the existing export endpoint and browser download only after owner action.

notes: Completed as frontend-only trust polish. Added import preview, raw card payload preservation, explicit JSON export, and safe export filename cleanup. The visual pass used a local Playwright harness because this legacy product modal is not exposed by a dedicated React Router route in the current app shell. No Schema/API/database change.
